raw_source.title: [Remote]Community & Social Media
raw_source.body:
**Job Description:**
-Manage cross-platform social media accounts, curate content calendars, and foster community growth and brand awareness.
-Develop a social media and community-building strategy and monitor metrics to optimize.
**What we offer:**
**-Competitive Benefits**: competitive pay + bonus + token allocation (after six months).
**-Continuous Learning**: Two-week onboarding training + resources + skill-sharing sessions.
**-Craft Your Own Journey**: Doing what you're already awesome at, and exploring what you dream of conquering.
**-Flat Organization**: Chat and word directly with our co-founders. We thrive on open conversations and cherish every unique perspective.
**-Web 3.0 Passport**: We are one of the largest Web3 founder and developer communities, event organizers, and education platforms in APAC.

**What you should bring:**
**-Enthusiasm Towards Web3 /Blockchain Technology**: Passion and interest in Web3 and Education.
**-Analytical Skills**: Strong analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data, draw insights, and make data-driven recommendations.
**-Communication Skills**: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
**-Self-Motivated Team Player**: Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. Willing to learn, enjoy taking challenges, embrace the steep learning curve.
**-Previous Experience Preferred**: At least 2 years experience in social media. Academic experience in computer science and data science. Professional experience in Marketing, Strategy, Consulting, or related fields and in startup environments, especially in the Web 3.0 sector, is preferred.

**Employment:**
Full-time or Part-time

**Work Location:**
Remote

 **Contact**
E-mail: Carina205001@163.com
Telegram: https://t.me/kevisbuidl

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。

**-Previous Experience Preferred**: At least 2 years experience in social media. Academic experience in computer science and data science. Professional experience in Marketing, Strategy, Consulting, or related fields and in startup environments, especially in the Web 3.0 sector, is preferred.
